title: Change default directory of auth for podman login
body:
The credentials are now stored in /run/containers/UID
if $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR is not set.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Conflicts with c/image revendor in progress in #505
@mheon oh I didn't realise the auth changes got picked up. I will close this.
